docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,197.79 FILED BY DE LIMA, JOSE VANDEVALTER AMORIM AS TO DEFENDANT GARGANO, FRANK WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LIMA, JOSE VANDEVALTER AMORIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARGANO, FRANK WILLIAM $6,197.79 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,372.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-17-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JOSE VANDEVALTER AMORIM DE LIMA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANK WILLIAM GARGANO IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WU. PLAINTIFF JOSE VANDEVALTER AMORIM DE LIMA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANK WILLIAM GARGANO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGRET WU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
